Video.summary: British sailor Edward falls in love with Manuela Cortez against her father's wishes.
Video.title: Ship of No Return

Video.summary: A rancher engaged to a refined woman looks for a gentle way to fire his longtime housekeeper.
Video.title: The Moving Out of Minnie

Video.summary: The unexpected arrival of men from Rose's criminal past threatens her happiness.
Video.title: Thorn of the Rose

Video.summary: A kidnapper who delivers unwilling brides to a religious cult realizes his shame.
Video.title: Perilous Cargo

Video.summary: A gunsmith and a crack shot duel.
Video.title: The Gunsmith

Video.summary: A captain tries to clear a trading post owner accused of selling ammunition to the enemy.
Video.title: A Bullet for the Captain

Video.summary: Justin Gates must save a boy deathly ill after swallowing a concoction offered by a medicine man.
Video.title: Rx Slow Death

Video.summary: A Mexican official must decide between his fellow caballeros and his obligations to the U.S.
Video.title: Olvera

Video.summary: A man goes too far promoting a phony religious philosophy based on the novel The Gates Ajar.
Video.title: Gates Ajar Morgan

Video.summary: Sam Kee, ostracized because he's Chinese, finds refuge at a fort after saving a soldier's life.
Video.title: Sam Kee and Uncle Sam

Video.summary: When valuable items disappear, Maj. Bullock suspects Charlie Stoner.
Video.title: Fair Exchange

Video.summary: After a skirmish with hostile Natives, prisoners arrive at the fort, including an ill girl.
Video.title: Indian Emily

Video.summary: Rival communications companies vie for bonus money to build the first transcontinental telegraph.
Video.title: Hang 'Em High

Video.summary: The son of a Native chief faces trial after being accused of the murder of a fellow tribesman.
Video.title: Tribal Justice

Video.summary: A female journalist reports on a corrupt politician.
Video.title: Lady of the Press

Video.summary: Actor Edwin Booth faces discrimination due to his brother's assassination of President Lincoln.
Video.title: His Brother's Keeper

Video.summary: A couple face opposition to their marriage, the governor of California.
Video.title: Forbidden Wedding

Video.summary: Entrepreneur Levi Strauss starts the world's first blue jean manufacturer.
Video.title: The Million Dollar Pants

Video.summary: A Native chief's young widow fights an ancient ritual following her husband's death.
Video.title: Human Sacrifice

Video.summary: On a peace mission, a rancher and a Native meet a prospector who thinks they're after his gold.
Video.title: Mission to the Mountains

Video.summary: A woman refuses to give her oxen to General Sam Houston for use in the war against Mexico.
Video.title: Pamela's Oxen

Video.summary: A man seeking to open a saloon turns to Harry Bassett, Wyatt Earp and Bat Masterson for help.
Video.title: Extra Guns

Video.summary: The Salt War erupts when a rancher decides to sell salt that used to be free.
Video.title: The Salt War

Video.summary: A ghost-plagued woman hires a detective to take her and her fortune to San Francisco.
Video.title: South of Horror Flats

Video.summary: A tenderfoot teams with a prospector who is quick to live up to his reputation as a jinx.
Video.title: Gamble with Death

Video.summary: A campaign to annex Oregon Territory.
Video.title: Who's Fer Divide?

Video.summary: A con artist boasts he owns most of San Francisco, but a chemist aims to expose him.
Video.title: The Stolen City

Video.summary: Montana's corrupt governor tries to reform his image.
Video.title: The General Who Disappeared

Video.summary: Townspeople unite against a couple who refuse to carry guns and fight.
Video.title: Devil's Bar

Video.summary: A prospector tries to swindle a silver baron.
Video.title: Chicken Bill

Video.summary: A recent widower wants a headstone.
Video.title: The Lone Grave

Video.summary: A condemned outlaw is offered his freedom if he helps capture his criminal friend.
Video.title: The Informer Who Cried

Video.summary: An inexperienced young man hears about a planned ambush on the sheriff and vows to help.
Video.title: The Friend

Video.summary: Two prospectors pull a hoax on a banker who wants their mine.
Video.title: The Great Diamond Mines

Video.summary: Prospectors venture into Death Valley to find a legendary lost mine.
Video.title: A Friend Indeed

Video.summary: A settler must prove an inheritance.
Video.title: The Pieces of the Puzzle

Video.summary: A woman's love inspires an aspiring preacher to stand up to a bully.
Video.title: The Other Cheek

Video.summary: A set of circumstances prevent friends from keeping control of their potential millions.
Video.title: Ten Day Millionaires

Video.summary: A former outlaw takes the unenviable job of sheriff in a lawless town, and old habits die hard.
Video.title: A Restless Man

Video.summary: A physician courts disaster by aiding one of two feuding Natives.
Video.title: The Lady Doctor

Video.summary: There's more than gold in store for prim Wilhelmina Vail when she tackles a claim in Utah territory.
Video.title: Talk to Me, Charley

Video.summary: Father de la Cuesta is curious why a deceased padre ordered a hand organ for the mission.
Video.title: A Gift from Father Tapis

Video.summary: A spectacular wrinkle develops around an aging marshal's refusal to wear glasses.
Video.title: Ton of Tin

Video.summary: Tiger Lil tries to leave her dance hall days behind her, but Frank Johnson won't give up on her.
Video.title: Lady with a Past
